translations.es: Tu peinado se ve genial hoy.
translations.de: Deine Frisur sieht heute toll aus.
translations.it: Oggi la tua acconciatura è fantastica.
translations.vi: Kiểu tóc của bạn hôm nay trông thật đẹp.
translations.nl: Je kapsel ziet er vandaag geweldig uit.
translations.hi: आज तुम्हारा हेयरस्टाइल बहुत बढ़िया लग रहा है.
translations.el: Το χτένισμά σου δείχνει υπέροχο σήμερα.
translations.nb: Frisyren din ser kjempebra ut i dag.
translations.id: Gaya rambutmu terlihat keren hari ini.
translations.sv: Din frisyr ser jättebra ut i dag.
translations.da: Din frisure ser fantastisk ud i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はヘアスタイルがとても似合っています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), feminine singular; modifies the noun 'coiffure' (subject).
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present indicative; links the subject to the predicate.
Predicative adjective (invariable) evaluating the subject.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; indicates time.

sentences.target: Je change de coiffure avant la fête.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɑ̃ʒ də kwafyʁ avɑ̃ la fɛt/

translations.fr: Je change de coiffure avant la fête.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɑ̃ʒ də kwafyʁ avɑ̃ la fɛt/
translations.en: I'm changing my hairstyle before the party.
translations.es: Me cambio el peinado antes de la fiesta.
translations.de: Ich ändere meine Frisur vor der Party.
translations.zh-Hans: 我会在聚会前换个发型。
translations.yue: 我會喺派對之前換個髮型。
translations.pt: Vou mudar o penteado antes da festa.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ đổi kiểu tóc trước bữa tiệc.
translations.nl: Ik ga mijn kapsel veranderen voor het feest.
translations.hi: मैं पार्टी से पहले अपना हेयरस्टाइल बदल रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Θα αλλάξω χτένισμα πριν από το πάρτι.
translations.nb: Jeg skal bytte frisyre før festen.
translations.id: Saya akan mengganti gaya rambut sebelum pesta.
translations.sv: Jag ska byta frisyr före festen.
translations.ro: Îmi schimb coafura înainte de petrecere.
translations.ja: パーティーの前に髪型を変えます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, 1st person singular present indicative; expresses the action.
Preposition introducing the complement 'coiffure' with the construction 'changer de'.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of the preposition 'de' (what is being changed).
Preposition introducing the temporal phrase 'la fête'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'fête'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'avant'.

sentences.target: Cette coiffure ne tient pas sous la pluie.
sentences.reading: /sɛt kwafyʁ nə tjɛ̃ pa su la plɥi/

translations.fr: Cette coiffure ne tient pas sous la pluie.
translations.ipa: /sɛt kwafyʁ nə tjɛ̃ pa su la plɥi/
translations.en: This hairstyle doesn't hold up in the rain.
translations.es: Este peinado no aguanta bajo la lluvia.
translations.de: Diese Frisur hält im Regen nicht.
translations.it: Questa acconciatura non regge sotto la pioggia.
translations.ko: 이 헤어스타일은 비 오면 유지가 안 돼요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这种发型在雨里撑不住。
translations.ru: Эта причёска не держится под дождём.
translations.pt: Esse penteado não aguenta na chuva.
translations.vi: Kiểu tóc này không giữ được khi trời mưa.
translations.ar: هذه التسريحة لا تصمد تحت المطر.
translations.nl: Dit kapsel blijft niet sitzen in de regen.
translations.uk: Ця зачіска не тримається під дощем.
translations.hu: Ez a frizura esőben nem tart.
translations.hi: यह हेयरस्टाइल बारिश में टिकता नहीं है.
translations.pl: Ta fryzura nie trzyma się na deszczu.
translations.el: Αυτό το χτένισμα δεν κρατάει στη βροχή.
translations.nb: Denne frisyren holder ikke i regnet.
translations.id: Gaya rambut ini tidak bertahan saat hujan.
translations.sv: Den här frisyren håller inte i regn.
translations.ro: Coafura asta nu rezistă în ploaie.
translations.da: Denne frisure holder ikke i regn.
translations.ja: この髪型は雨だと持ちません。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; points to a specific 'coiffure'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Clitic negative particle; first part of the discontinuous negation 'ne ... pas'.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; head of the predicate.
Negative adverb completing the 'ne ... pas' negation.
Preposition introducing the prepositional phrase 'sous la pluie'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'pluie'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'sous'.

sentences.target: La coiffure du mariage est presque prête.
sentences.reading: /la kwafyʁ dy maʁjaʒ ɛ pʁɛsk pʁɛt/

translations.fr: La coiffure du mariage est presque prête.
translations.ipa: /la kwafyʁ dy maʁjaʒ ɛ pʁɛsk pʁɛt/
translations.en: The wedding hairstyle is almost ready.
translations.es: El peinado de la boda está casi listo.
translations.it: L'acconciatura per il matrimonio è quasi pronta.
translations.yue: 婚禮個髮型就快整好啦。
translations.pt: O penteado de casamento está quase pronto.
translations.vi: Kiểu tóc cưới gần như xong rồi.
translations.hi: शादी की हेयरस्टाइल लगभग तैयार है.
translations.el: Το νυφικό χτένισμα είναι σχεδόν έτοιμο.
translations.ro: Coafura de nuntă este aproape gata.
translations.ja: 結婚式のヘアスタイルはほぼ完成です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'coiffure'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Preposition (contraction of 'de' + 'le'); introduces the noun complement 'mariage'.

Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present indicative; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Degree adverb modifying the adjective 'prête'.
Predicate adjective, feminine singular; agrees with 'coiffure'.
